summary: Super Admin System - Full testing complete. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend features verified working: Super Admin login, Dashboard with 6 global stats, Overview tab (Top Performing Admins, Recently Added Admins), Admins tab (table with search/filter), Create Admin modal, Admin actions menu (View Details, Login as Admin, Deactivate), Analytics tab with period filter, Audit Log tab, RBAC enforcement (regular admins get 403 on superadmin endpoints), Impersonation feature.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions (-1, -1) when rendering - charts still display correctly but may have initial sizing issues
'Top Performing Businesses' in Analytics tab shows tenant_id instead of business name for some entries (e.g., 'b9b454bf-960e-4082-8176-30f196b1e001')

passed_tests: Super Admin login with superadmin@bijnisbooks.com / SuperAdmin@123
Super Admin login fails with wrong password (401)
Regular Admin login with demo@brandmafia.com / demo123
Super Admin Dashboard loads with all 6 global stats (Total Admins: 4, Active Admins: 4, Total Customers: 10, Total Revenue: 0, Total Orders: 23, Total Stores: 6)
Overview tab shows Top Performing Admins section with revenue
Overview tab shows Recently Added Admins with Active badges
Admins tab displays admin management table with 4 admins
Admins tab has search input and status filter dropdown
Create Admin button opens modal with all required fields (Name, Email, Password, Business Name, Business Type, Plan, Phone, Address)
Create Admin API successfully creates new admin with tenant
Admin details endpoint returns comprehensive stats, users, and stores
Toggle admin status works (activate/deactivate)
Admin actions menu shows: View Details, Login as Admin, Deactivate/Activate
Analytics tab shows Market Analytics with Total Sales, Total Orders, New Admins
Analytics tab has period filter (Last 24 Hours, Last 7 Days, Last 30 Days, Last Year)
Audit Log tab shows super admin action history (Admin Impersonated, Activated, Deactivated, Created)
Impersonation feature works - Super Admin can login as regular admin
RBAC: Regular admin gets 403 on /api/superadmin/dashboard
RBAC: Regular admin gets 403 on /api/superadmin/admins
RBAC: Regular admin gets 403 on /api/superadmin/market-analytics
RBAC: Regular admin gets 403 on /api/superadmin/audit-log
RBAC: Regular admin gets 403 when trying to create admin
RBAC: Regular admin gets 403 when trying to impersonate
critical_code_review_comments: Super Admin is auto-created on server startup if not exists (line 10055-10072 in server.py) - credentials hardcoded in code for demo
Impersonation stores original superadmin_token in localStorage - allows returning to superadmin session
WebSocket connection fails for superadmin tenant but doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed admin accounts for testing - these are cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin System fully implemented and tested. Super Admin has simplified sidebar (Dashboard, Market Analytics, Settings). Navigation: Login -> Redirects to /superadmin-dashboard automatically for superadmin role. Features: 4 tabs (Overview, Admins, Analytics, Audit Log), Create Admin button, Admin actions dropdown (View Details, Login as Admin, Activate/Deactivate). Impersonation works by storing superadmin_token and switching to admin token. RBAC strictly enforced - all /api/superadmin/* endpoints return 403 for non-superadmin users.

features: Real-time data aggregation across all tenants
